class.name: JustAMCPServer
class.brief_description: Runs the editor-side Model Context Protocol server.
class.description: [JustAMCPServer] owns the editor-facing MCP transport and emits signals for JSON-RPC tool requests, server lifecycle changes, elicitation responses, and cancellation notices. Most projects use it through the JustAMCP editor plugin or [JustAMCPRuntime] rather than instantiating it manually. [codeblock] var server = JustAMCPServer.new() server.tool_requested.connect(func(request_id, tool_name, args): print("MCP tool requested: ", tool_name) ) [/codeblock]

signal.name: elicitation_completed
signal.description: Emitted when an elicitation request finishes. [param request_id] identifies the request and [param result] contains the user response or completion payload.

signal.name: request_cancelled
signal.description: Emitted when a pending MCP request is cancelled. [param request_id] identifies the request and [param reason] explains the cancellation.

signal.name: server_status_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the MCP server starts or stops. [param started] is [code]true[/code] while the server is running.

signal.name: tool_requested
signal.description: Emitted when an MCP client requests a tool call. Handlers should execute [param tool_name] with [param args] and respond using the associated [param request_id].
